message:
fix: replace window.closeLangSwitcher with custom DOM event (#1491)

The Navbar component was attaching closeLangSwitcher to the global
window object so other dropdown handlers could close the language
switcher. This pollutes the global namespace and is fragile.

Replace with a custom DOM event (close-lang-switcher) dispatched on
document. The language switcher setup registers a listener for this
event, and dropdown hover/escape handlers dispatch it instead of
calling a window global. Cleanup on unmount removes the listener.

Fixes #1456

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
